untranslatable_reason: Signal requires cointegration testing (cadf test), hedge ratio calculation, and spread construction between two securities. These are portfolio-level operations requiring two separate price series, optimal weighting via statistical cointegration analysis, and spread stationarity verification. The allowed indicator set does not include cointegration metrics, spread construction, or multi-leg portfolio operations. Standard single-price indicators cannot express this pairs trading logic.
translation_notes: This is a pairs trading/statistical arbitrage strategy that fundamentally requires: (1) cointegration confirmation between two securities, (2) dynamic hedge ratio calculation, (3) spread construction as a new synthetic series, and (4) mean-reversion detection on the spread. None of these operations are expressible using single-price indicators. A workaround using sma_20 is provided for illustrative purposes only but does not capture the actual signal intent. A proper implementation requires a dedicated pairs trading engine outside the scope of this single-instrument backtester.
